lessons.title: Monk Fundamentals
lessons.description: Learn the core principles of Monk: the form system, basic combos, and positional requirements.
keyPoints: Forms cycle: Opo-opo → Raptor → Coeurl → Opo-opo
Each form has specific weaponskills: Bootshine/Dragon Kick (Opo-opo), True Strike/Twin Snakes (Raptor), Snap Punch/Demolish (Coeurl)
Positionals: Bootshine/Demolish require rear, True Strike/Snap Punch require flank
Hitting positionals correctly grants bonus potency - essential for optimal damage
tips: The form cycle is automatic - just use the correct GCD for your current form
Learn boss patterns to position yourself for positionals before your GCD lands

lessons.title: Maintaining Your Buffs
lessons.description: Master buff maintenance with Disciplined Fist, Demolish DoT, and out-of-combat Meditation.
keyPoints: Disciplined Fist (+15% damage) from Twin Snakes/Demolish - never let this drop
Demolish is a powerful DoT (18s duration) - maintain near 100% uptime
Refresh Demolish when it has ~3 seconds remaining
Meditation: Build Chakra out of combat to start fights with resources ready
tips: Twin Snakes (Raptor form) and Demolish (Coeurl form) both grant Disciplined Fist
Use Meditation during downtime or before pulls to build Chakra for burst

lessons.title: The Chakra System
lessons.description: Understand Chakra generation and spending for optimal damage output.
keyPoints: Chakra gauge: 0-5 stacks, builds from weaponskills and critical hits
The Forbidden Chakra (5 Chakra): High-potency single-target oGCD
Enlightenment (5 Chakra): AoE alternative for 3+ targets
Never overcap Chakra - spend at 5 stacks before generating more
tips: Chakra generates faster during Brotherhood buff - more critical hits
Weave Chakra spenders between GCDs to maximize damage

lessons.title: Beast Chakra & Masterful Blitz
lessons.description: Master the Beast Chakra system and learn which Blitz to execute based on your combination.
keyPoints: Beast Chakra types: Opo-opo (Lunar), Raptor (Solar), Coeurl (Celestial)
3 matching Beast Chakra = Elixir Field (large AoE)
2 Solar + 1 different = Rising Phoenix (cone AoE)
All 3 different types = Phantom Rush (highest single-target, requires Fury buff)
Masterful Blitz becomes available when you have 3 Beast Chakra
tips: In single-target, aim for Phantom Rush (all 3 different) for max damage
In AoE, Elixir Field (3 matching) hits all nearby enemies

lessons.title: Burst Windows
lessons.description: Execute powerful burst windows with Perfect Balance, Riddle of Fire, and Brotherhood.
keyPoints: Perfect Balance (2 charges, 40s recharge): Use any weaponskill regardless of form
Riddle of Fire (60s CD, 20s duration): +15% damage buff - core burst window
Brotherhood (120s CD): Party-wide 5% damage buff + Chakra generation boost
Align Riddle of Fire and Brotherhood with party raid buffs for maximum impact
tips: Use Perfect Balance to quickly build Beast Chakra during Riddle of Fire
Brotherhood aligns with 2-minute party buffs - coordinate with your group

lessons.title: Movement & Utility
lessons.description: Master gap closers, True North usage, and auto-attack optimization.
keyPoints: Thunderclap (3 charges): Dash to target - use for gap closing and dodging
True North (2 charges, 45s recharge): Ignore positional requirements for 10s
Riddle of Wind: Increases auto-attack speed - free damage during burst
Save True North for when mechanics prevent proper positioning
tips: Don't waste Thunderclap charges - keep at least one for emergency movement
Plan True North usage around fight mechanics you know will disrupt positioning

lessons.title: AoE & Optimization
lessons.description: Learn the AoE rotation and advanced optimization techniques.
keyPoints: AoE combo: Arm of the Destroyer → Four-point Fury → Rockbreaker
Switch to AoE rotation at 3+ targets for efficiency
Howling Fist: AoE oGCD - use with Enlightenment in multi-target
Perfect Balance works in AoE too - quickly build Beast Chakra for Elixir Field
tips: In dungeons, use AoE combo on trash packs, single-target on bosses
Even in AoE, maintain Disciplined Fist buff for the damage bonus
